title: NLP-008-what-are-n-grams-and-how-do-they-contribute-to-language-modeling原理与应用

abstract:
NLP-008 What are n-grams and how do they contribute to language modeling?

 8. What are n-grams and how do they contribute to language modeling?
答案要点:
- 定义: 连续的 n 个词/字符序列
- 类型: Unigrams, Bigrams, Trigrams
- 语言模型应用:
  - Text Prediction (下一个词预测)
  - Speech Recognition
  - Machine Translation
  - Spelling Correction
- 局限: 数据稀疏、长距离依赖
- 平滑技术: Laplace, Good-Turing, Kneser-Ney

代码示例:

sections.title: 8. What are n-grams and how do they contribute to language modeling?
sections.content:
**答案要点:**
- **定义**: 连续的 n 个词/字符序列
- **类型**: Unigrams, Bigrams, Trigrams
- **语言模型应用**:
  - Text Prediction (下一个词预测)
  - Speech Recognition
  - Machine Translation
  - Spelling Correction
- **局限**: 数据稀疏、长距离依赖
- **平滑技术**: Laplace, Good-Turing, Kneser-Ney

**代码示例:**
```python
from nltk import ngrams

text = "I love NLP"
bigrams = list(ngrams(text.split(), 2))
print(bigrams)  # [('I', 'love'), ('love', 'NLP')]
```

**质量评分**: 91/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

sections.title: 二、机器学习与深度学习 (9-18)
